headline: FIG vs. ADSK: Which Stock Has an Edge in the Design SaaS Market?
summary: Autodesk stands out from Figma as AI-powered tools, proprietary data and rising earnings outlook outweigh FIG's margin pressure and steep stock slide.

headline: Shepherd raises $42m in Series B round for insurance platform
summary: With this latest investment, Shepherd’s total funding now stands at $67m.
